response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security practices required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven track record in event-driven and distributed systems
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols, SDL, or IEC 62443 standards
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) misaligns with core C++ requirements
